sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I see! The green frames have different center colors:
- Green id=7: child id=9, color=W (white) - active
- Green id=11: child id=12, color=c (charcoal/dark gray) - inside dark frame id=10
- Green id=15: child id=16, color=B (black) - inactive
- Green id=18: child id=19, color=c (charcoal/dark gray) - inside dark frame id=17
So the green frames inside dark frames have charcoal (c) centers, not white or black. This is different from the active/inactive green frames which have white/black centers.
So the pattern is:
- White center: active (controllable) green frame
- Black center: inactive green frame
- Charcoal center: green frame inside a dark frame (completed)
This means the green frames id=11 and id=18 are "completed" (inside dark frames), and the green frames id=7 and id=15 are not completed.
Now, the green frame id=7 is at rows 30-35, cols 30-32, and it can't move LEFT or UP because of the purple cross. It can move DOWN and RIGHT.
Wait, but the green frame id=7 is at rows 30-35, which is below the purple horizontal bar (rows 24-26). And it's at cols 30-32, which is to the right of the purple vertical bar (cols 21-29). So the green frame is in the bottom-right quadrant.
The target dark frame id=4 is in the top-left quadrant. The green frame can't reach it because of the purple cross.
Hmm, let me reconsider. Maybe the green frame CAN move through the purple cross, but only if it's at the right position. Let me try moving the green frame UP from its current position to see if it can pass through the horizontal bar.
Actually, the green frame is at rows 30-35. The horizontal bar is at rows 24-26. To move UP, the green frame would go to rows 27-32, then 24-29, which overlaps with the horizontal bar at rows 24-26. So the green frame can't move UP past rows 27-32.
But wait, the green frame is currently at rows 30-35. If I move UP, it goes to rows 27-32. At rows 27-32, the green frame is below the horizontal bar (rows 24-26), so it should be able to move UP once more to rows 24-29. But rows 24-29 overlaps with the horizontal bar at rows 24-26.
Actually, let me check if the green frame can move UP from rows 30-35. Earlier, I tried moving UP 11 times, and the green frame ended up at rows 30-35 (it moved UP 4 times from rows 42-47 to rows 30-35, and then stopped). So the green frame can move UP to rows 30-35, but not further.
Wait, the green frame is currently at rows 30-35. Let me try moving UP once to see if it can move further.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving UP from current position
action(['UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
